subtitle: “Social Impact” Art Gallery is an artistic and theoretical project run by Hawk Stars NGO – Association for Education, Innovation and Social Development, with the Curator of Plastic/Visual Artist and Investigator Romy Castro and Visual Artist and Sofia F Architect .August, aiming at contributing to the funding of various social projects promoted by Hawk Stars, to the social development of the interior of Country.
description_1: The “Social Impact” Art Gallery is first aimed at promoting Arts and Artists. While promoting artists, it is intended to contribute also financially, through the sale of artworks, to the building rebuilding that will give way to the International Training Center inserted into the NGO Hawk Stars Global Village Project, which will take place in the City of Pinhel , in the Guard District, in Portugal.
description_2: Following this goal fulfilled, the “Social Impact” Art Gallery will continue to exist as a Crowdfunding platform to finance other possible social impact projects.
